texts.content:
INVOICE # INV-2025-0891

BrightPath Web Services
55 Digital Lane, Suite 300
San Francisco, CA 94102

Bill To: GreenLeaf Cafe, 22 Park Street

Service Description                         Amount
-----------------------------------------------
Website redesign — homepage & contact page   $2,400.00
Monthly hosting & maintenance (March 2025)      $150.00
SEO optimization consultation                   $600.00
-----------------------------------------------
Total Due:                                    $3,150.00

Payment Terms: Net 30
Due Date: April 15, 2025

Please include invoice number with payment.
Late payments subject to 1.5% monthly interest.

questions.stem: What is the purpose of this document?
options: A. To advertise web design services
B. To request payment for completed services
C. To provide a cost estimate for future work
D. To confirm a contract agreement
questions.explanation: The document is an invoice with a total due amount, payment terms, and a due date — all indicating a payment request.

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the payment terms 'Net 30'?
options: A. The client must pay 30 percent upfront
B. Payment is due within 30 days of the invoice date
C. The client can pay in 30 monthly installments
D. A 30 percent discount applies for early payment
questions.explanation: 'Net 30' is a standard business term meaning the full payment is due within 30 days.

questions.stem: What happens if the payment is made after the due date?
options: A. The service will be discontinued
B. Additional interest charges will apply
C. A late fee of $50 will be added
D. The invoice amount will be renegotiated
questions.explanation: The invoice states 'Late payments subject to 1.5% monthly interest,' meaning interest accrues on overdue amounts.

texts.content:
Fitness Center — Temporary Equipment Closure

Please be advised that the following equipment will be temporarily unavailable from March 10 through March 14 for routine maintenance:

- All treadmills (maintenance: belt replacement and calibration)
- Leg press machine (parts replacement)

Alternative equipment will remain available:
- Ellipticals (4 units)
- Stationary bikes (6 units)
- Free weights section (fully accessible)

We apologize for any inconvenience. The fitness center will operate regular hours throughout the maintenance period.

questions.stem: What is the main reason for the equipment closure?
options: A. The fitness center is undergoing renovation
B. The equipment requires routine maintenance
C. New equipment is being installed
D. There is a staffing shortage
questions.explanation: The notice states the closure is 'for routine maintenance,' including belt replacement and parts replacement.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the fitness center's operation during this period?
options: A. It will close early each day during maintenance
B. It will remain open with alternative equipment available
C. Only members with premium memberships can enter
D. It will be closed to the public for the entire week
questions.explanation: The notice lists alternative equipment that 'will remain available' and states that 'regular hours' will be maintained throughout the period.
